title: Sigma GeneElute Total RNA Extraction from Fungal Tissue
author: ALEXANDER J BRADSHAW
materials: Flash Freeze tissue in Liquid Nitrogen (LN2).
immediately store samples at -80C after loading gel.

steps.title: Grind Fungal Tissue to a fine...
steps.instruction: Grind Fungal Tissue to a fine powder with a mortar and pestle with LN2, be careful to not allow the tissue to thaw during this Process.

steps.title: At this point frozen ground tissue...
steps.instruction: At this point frozen ground tissue can be stored at -80C for later extraction.

steps.title: add 600ul of buffer RL to a 1
steps.instruction: add 600ul of buffer RL to a 1.7ml eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Place no more than 50mg of...
steps.instruction: Place no more than 50mg of ground tissue into the sample tube with buffer RL.

steps.title: Incubate for 15-30 minutes at room temperature Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15-30 minutes at room temperature Room temperature

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 2...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 2 minutes Centrifuge (Benchtop Centrifuge, Eppendorf, 5405000441, Any benchtop centrifuge will suffice, https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Centrifugation-44533/Centrifuges-44534/Centrifuge-5425-PF-243560.html )

steps.title: Transfer the lysate to a new RNAse free 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate to a new RNAse free 1.7ml tube.

steps.title: Add 1:1 volume (so 600ul) of freshly prepared 70% etoh
steps.instruction: Add 1:1 volume (so 600ul) of freshly prepared 70% etoh

steps.title: Vortex for 10 seconds, or until homogenous
steps.instruction: Vortex for 10 seconds, or until homogenous

steps.title: Assemble a column with a waste...
steps.instruction: Assemble a column with a waste tube from the GeneElute kit.

steps.title: ALL WORK MUST BE DONE IN...
steps.instruction: ALL WORK MUST BE DONE IN THE STERILE HOOD THAT HAS BEEN CLEANED FOR RNA WORK REGULARLY CHNAGE GLOVES AND WASH HANDS WITH RNASE TO AVOID DEGREDATION MAKE SURE ALL PIPETORS, TIPS, AND ANY OTHER EQUIPMENT ARE IN THE HOOD AND CLEANED WITH RNASE DO NOT MOVE ANYTHING IN OR OUT WITHOUT WASHING WITH RNASE Reagents that need to be made: Fresh, day of 70% etoh

steps.title: Add 600ul of lysate/etoh solution to the assembled column
steps.instruction: Add 600ul of lysate/etoh solution to the assembled column

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6000G for 2 minuts
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6000G for 2 minuts

steps.title: If lysate is not completely passes,...
steps.instruction: If lysate is not completely passes, spin at an additional 14,000G for 1 minute

steps.title: Discard waste from waste tube, and...
steps.instruction: Discard waste from waste tube, and repeat step 13 and 14 if more lysate/etoh exists.

steps.title: Place column into a new waste collection tube
steps.instruction: Place column into a new waste collection tube

steps.title: Add 400ul of wash solution A to column
steps.instruction: Add 400ul of wash solution A to column

steps.title: Centrifuges at max speed for 1
steps.instruction: Centrifuges at max speed for 1.5 minutes

steps.title: Repeat steps 17-19 two more times...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 17-19 two more times (for a total of 3x wash steps)

steps.title: Centrifuge Sample for a final 2...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge Sample for a final 2 minute dry spin at max speed

steps.title: Place column in a clean eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Place column in a clean eppendorf tube provided in the GeneElute kit.

steps.title: add 50ul of elution solution A
steps.instruction: add 50ul of elution solution A

steps.title: Centrifuge at 200G for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 200G for 2 minutes

steps.title: centrifuge at 14,000G for 1 minute
steps.instruction: centrifuge at 14,000G for 1 minute

steps.title: If the entire 50ul has not...
steps.instruction: If the entire 50ul has not eluted, then spin for an additional minute at 14,000G

steps.title: Keep eluted samples on Ice, Prepare...
steps.instruction: Keep eluted samples on Ice, Prepare a bleach gel for RNA analysis

steps.title: BLEACH GEL
steps.instruction: BLEACH GEL: 100ml TAE 400ul concentrated bleach 1g agarose Make sure to add bleach before microwaving.

steps.title: Load and run samples normally at...
steps.instruction: Load and run samples normally at 120V for ~20 minutes with a 100bp ladder.
